---
btitle: "Match day 9 Viz Pack 2023/24"
author: "Dr Phil Barter"
format: html


output:
  rmarkdown::html_document:
    theme: flatly
    toc: yes
  pdf_document: 
    toc: yes
    toc_depth: 2
    fig_width: 40px
    fig_height: 30px
    fig_caption: yes

  html_document:
    toc: yes
    toc_depth: '2'
    embed-resources: true
    grid:
      sidebar-width: 300px
      body-width: 1024px
      margin-width: 300px
      gutter-width: 1.5rem
    fig_width: 160px
    fig_height: 150px
    toc_float: true
    df_print: paged
font-family: Arial

---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

```{r, echo=FALSE}
files <- list.files(path = "~/Dropbox/AI lfc data/UP Pod Prep 2324/Match day 9/viz pack/",
                    pattern = "*.png",
                    full.names = TRUE) ## A cheeky one-liner
files <- files[order(file.info(files)$mtime, decreasing = FALSE)]
#knitr::include_graphics(files)
```



\newpage

# Match Day 9

## Line up

```{r, echo=FALSE, fig.height=30, fig.width= 40, out.height= 50, out.width= 40}
lineup <- list.files(path = "~/Dropbox/AI lfc data/UP Pod Prep 2324/Match day 9/viz pack/Line up/",
                    pattern = "*.png",
                    full.names = TRUE) ## A cheeky one-liner
lineup <- lineup[order(file.info(lineup)$ctime, decreasing = TRUE)]

```

```{r, echo=FALSE, results = "asis"}
for (file in lineup) {
  cat("", "\n")
  cat("![](",file,")", "\n")
  cat("\n")
  caption <- paste0("**Caption:** ", tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(file)), "\n")
  cat(caption)
  cat("", "\n")
  cat("\n")
  cat("\n")
}
```

\newpage

## Liverpool

```{r, echo=FALSE, fig.height=30, fig.width= 40,out.height= 215, out.width= 250,}
LFCfiles <- list.files(path = "~/Dropbox/AI lfc data/UP Pod Prep 2324/Match day 9/viz pack/LFC",
                    pattern = "*.png",
                    full.names = TRUE) ## A cheeky one-liner
LFCfiles <- LFCfiles[order(file.info(LFCfiles)$mtime, decreasing = FALSE)]

#knitr::include_graphics(LFCfiles)
```

```{r, echo=FALSE, results = "asis"}
for (file in LFCfiles) {
  cat("", "\n")
  cat("![](",file,")", "\n")
  cat("\n")
  caption <- paste0("**Caption:** ", tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(file)), "\n")
  cat(caption)
  cat("", "\n")
  cat("\n")
  cat("\n")
}
```

\newpage

## Opposition

```{r, echo=FALSE}
Oppofiles <- list.files(path = "~/Dropbox/AI lfc data/UP Pod Prep 2324/Match day 9/viz pack/Oppo/",
                    pattern = "*.png",
                    full.names = TRUE) ## A cheeky one-liner
Oppofiles <- Oppofiles[order(file.info(Oppofiles)$mtime, decreasing = FALSE)]

#knitr::include_graphics(Oppofiles)
```

```{r, echo=FALSE, results = "asis"}
for (file in Oppofiles) {
  cat("", "\n")
  cat("![](",file,")", "\n")
  cat("\n")
  caption <- paste0("**Caption:** ", tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(file)), "\n")
  cat(caption)
  cat("", "\n")
  cat("\n")
  cat("\n")
}
```

\newpage

## Liverpool Pressing

```{r, echo=FALSE}
pressfiles <- list.files(path = "~/Dropbox/AI lfc data/UP Pod Prep 2324/Match day 9/viz pack/Pressing/",
                    pattern = "*.png",
                    full.names = TRUE) ## A cheeky one-liner
pressfiles <- pressfiles[order(file.info(pressfiles)$mtime, decreasing = TRUE)]

#knitr::include_graphics(pressfiles)
```

```{r, echo=FALSE, results = "asis"}
for (file in pressfiles) {
  cat("", "\n")
  cat("![](",file,")", "\n")
  cat("\n")
  caption <- paste0("**Caption:** ", tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(file)), "\n")
  cat(caption)
  cat("", "\n")
  cat("\n")
  cat("\n")
}
```

\newpage
